title: Zero In Clothes Moth Killer, 300 ml Aerosol, Transparent, Surface Treatment Spray, Protects for up to 12 Months with In Moth Balls – Pack of 10 (Kills Moths, Larvae and Eggs, Odour-Free)
features: Aerosol which kills clothing moths on contact and gives long-lasting protection against larvae, designed for home use
Treatment safeguards your home from clothes moths and larvae for up to 12 months
Floral fragrance for fresh smelling household protection against clothes moths and larvae
Pack of 10 individually wrapped moth balls: value-added multi-pack allows for multiple coverage throughout the home, wherever clothes are stored and at risk from clothes moths
Stop damage from clothes moths: Moth balls protect all precious fabrics, including woollens, silks, cottons and furs, from damage caused by clothes moths, larvae and eggs in the home.
Smells of fresh linen: No unpleasant fragrances or odours, no fumes or stains
description: From the manufacturer TARGETS HOUSEHOLD PESTS The Zero In range of products from STV International provide pest control solutions for a variety of household pests, including bed bugs, ants, flies, wasps, clothes moths, and more. Everything you need to live pest-free Professional-quality products you can trust Experts in pest control for over 25 years Zero In Clothes Moth Killer Surface spray kills clothes moths and larvae Zero In Clothes Moth Killer kills clothes moths, their larvae and eggs for total clothes moth population control. Long-lasting treatment of wardrobes, cupboards and drawers prior to clothes storage. Not for direct application to clothing or fabrics. Contains cypermethrin. Total protection against clothes moths for up to 12 months For use on hard surfaces in drawers, cupboards and wardrobes. Kills clothes moths, their larvae and eggs Contains cypermethrin Product Highlights Long-lasting Treatment Residual effect lasts up to 12 months where treated (when not exposed to direct sunlight). Total Population Control Kills clothes moths, their larvae and eggs for total reduction of the clothes moth population. Protects Clothes in Storage Spray inside wardrobes, drawers and cupboards. Do not spray directly onto fabrics. All-round Protection Zero In brings you a wide range of moth control solutions including pheromone traps, diffusers, aerosols, natural repellents and more - everything you need for complete protection against clothes moths. Product Highlights Long-lasting Treatment Effective control of clothes moths for up to 3 months with no fumes, unpleasant smells or staining. Total Population Control Kills clothes moths, their larvae and eggs for long lasting protection of stored clothing and fabrics. Protects Clothes in Storage Suitable for treating wardrobes, cupboards and drawers to protect delicate woollens and fabrics from clothes moth damage. All-round Protection Zero In brings you a wide range of moth control solutions including pheromone traps, diffusers, aerosols, natural repellents and more - everything you need for complete protection against clothes moths. Understanding Clothes Moths Signs of Clothes Moths Unfortunately the first sure sign of a clothes moth infestation will be damage to natural clothing and fabrics. Particularly if the items affected have been kept in storage. Look out for: Causes of Clothes Moth Clothes moths are attracted to animal hair (wool, cashmere, fur) which provides a rich source of food for their larvae. Dirty/used clothes are usually to blame for initial infestations as moths are drawn to sweat and body oil. Be extra careful when introducing vintage clothing to wardrobes and drawers and ideally wash/dry clean before storing. Treatment & Prevention Larvae cause the damage so it's important to break the cycle. Wash clothing before storage and place Zero In moth repellent products within wardrobes and drawers. Apply Zero In solutions and sprays to the inside of wardrobes and furniture prior to storing fabrics inside and monitor for infestations with pheromone traps. Always read on-pack instructions before use.
